messages.content: Put the sentence 'Owens is going to betray you and hand the Corbex code over to Juan' into a subtext implyed by entirely different words spoken in the style of a sweet, girly woman.

"Oh my goodness, have you seen how chummy Owens has been with Juan lately? I'm sure he has the best intentions, sharing his latest project updates and all. Just be cautious, sweetheart, not everyone has your best interest at heart when they're whispering secrets over tea."
"Oh, Owens is just so helpful, isn't he? Always ready to share with Juan. Just be careful—some friendships can have surprising outcomes.”

1. "I've noticed Owens spending time with Juan, they seem to be getting quite close. Just make sure to guard your special projects, darling."

2. "Isn't it sweet how Owens is always there for Juan? Just keep your treasures close, sometimes kindness can lead to unexpected twists."

3. "Owens and Juan are becoming such good friends, aren't they? I hope they remember to think of others when sharing, especially the delicate stuff."

4. "You've seen Owens and Juan chatting, right? They're like two peas in a pod. Just be mindful, we wouldn't want your hard work to become a game of pass-the-parcel."

5. "Oh, Owens has been so thoughtful with Juan recently, really generous. It's important to choose whom to trust with our little secrets, though, don't you think?"
as a sequel of number 4 in this list, when asked to eleborate, have the character respond, in character' with the subtext of 'Owens is going to hand over the code you worked on. Keep it safe'.

"Oh, it's just that sometimes when people get all cozy, they might start sharing more than just laughs and smiles. It's like when you lend someone your favorite dress, and then it ends up at a party without you. Just make sure your precious code is locked away in your own little jewelry box, you know?"
"Well, you know how it is—friends share stories and sometimes... little souvenirs. Just a gentle nudge to double-check the latch on your treasure chest."
Now write a line with the subtext of 'I am not your enemy. I never was your enemy. Nor shall I ever be.
"Oh, our paths may have crossed under complex stars, but the only role I've ever played in your story is that of a steadfast ally, and that, my dear, is a timeless script."
five more, short and subtle, yet firm and serious.

1. "We've journeyed together, you know my heart has always been aligned with yours."

2. "Believe me, our history is clear of battles; I've only ever stood by your side."

3. "Through every storm, my compass has pointed to solidarity, not to strife."

4. "You've known me; my actions have consistently echoed friendship, not enmity."

5. "Rest assured, my intentions have and will remain in kinship, never in conflict."
rewrite them all in a sweet, girly girl fashion.

1. "Trust in our shared giggles and secrets; my spirit has always danced with yours."

2. "Just remember all our shared whispers and pinky promises; I was never the one to draw a line in the sand."

3. "Even when the rain poured, I’ve been the one holding the umbrella over us both, never the thunder."

4. "Think of all the times we've braided our dreams together; my strands have always been woven with warmth, not wariness."

5. "Let your heart never doubt, I’ve always been the one cheering you on, with pom-poms, not pitfalls."
rewrite all, make them all more casual, natural,  yet serious.

1. "Hey, just look back at all our fun times; I've been in your corner from day one."

2. "We've got a history of high-fives, not crossed swords; I'm here as a friend, for real."

3. "Every time things got tough, it was me and you, side by side. That's just how it is."

4. "Between you and me, there's always been good vibes only; that's my promise."

5. "Keep in mind, my cheers have always been for you, never against you – that's just not my style."
